title: Trump Urges Iran Uprising After Launching Massive Strikes
description:
“This is the moment for action, do not let it pass.”

President Trump urged an uprising in Iran after the US and Israel launched a series of strikes against the regime in Tehran.

Joumanna Bercetche explains. (Source: Bloomberg)
